title: Create Body Fat Goal
description: Create or update a user's body fat goal.

parameters.name: user-id
parameters.description: The encoded ID of the user. Use "-" (dash) for current logged-in user.

parameters.name: fat
parameters.description: Target body fat percentage in the format X.XX.

response_fields.name: goal : fat
response_fields.description: The body fat goal to achieve.
